implementation_summary.summary: CP00-853 closes the descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace test/golden-case tail and spans Hermes evidence packet rows plus the Claude review packet head without emitting runtime receipts, executing review authority, mutating product state, or writing audit events.

plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
